meta.notes: Warm run — fresh session on pika-media-env. Agent used nohup+poll pattern. Translation pipeline: extract audio → Whisper transcribe → GPT-4o translate → ElevenLabs voice clone + TTS → ffmpeg audio replace. SKILL.md read returned error but agent proceeded correctly.

test_input.name: charli-daily-vlog.mp4
test_input.description: TikTok-style short vlog, English speech, vertical format

task.name: video-translation
task.purpose: Translate 67.8s English vlog to Spanish, no lip sync
task.expected_output: Spanish-dubbed mp4 with cloned speaker voice

install.notes: Skills pre-loaded. Dependencies pre-installed in environment. No install time counted.

asset_acquisition.notes: Downloaded 4.7MB in ~1.3s actual. Agent also read SKILL.md (11.1s, returned error but had content).

steps.name: nohup_background_start
steps.notes: Started translate_video.py in background via nohup

steps.name: poll_completion
steps.notes: Polled with sleep 10 loop. Script reported 54367ms total. Pipeline: extract audio → Whisper → GPT-4o → ElevenLabs clone + TTS → ffmpeg replace.

execution.notes: Full translation pipeline completed in 54.4s. API-bound: Whisper, GPT-4o, ElevenLabs (clone + TTS) are all network calls. ffmpeg stderr redirected.

delivery.notes: CDN upload in 1.7s actual. Output smaller than input (4.3MB vs 4.9MB) due to TTS audio bitrate.
